title: PDC — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC Public Design Commission (PDC) object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the three PDC Open Data datasets (data.cityofnewyork.us — Monthly Design Review tfrc-rjtr, Annual Report 5fsv-ze7v, Outdoor Public Art Inventory 2pg3-gcaa), nyc.gov/site/designcommission, and PDC's Charter Chapter 37 design-review process. Geography/identifier/address/money/party definitions are $ref'd from the canonical nyc-commons set; PDC's own review vocabulary (project type, level of review, action, result) is modeled locally from the datasets' real distinct values.

x-nyc-commons.note: Geography/identifier/address/money/party definitions are $ref'd from the canonical nyc-commons set; agency-specific definitions remain local.

Borough.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Borough); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Borough still resolve.

Coordinates.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Coordinates); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Coordinates still resolve.

Geography.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/GeographySpine); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Geography still resolve.

Address.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (address.json#/$defs/Address); the Outdoor Public Art Inventory carries address/city/state/zip columns.

BBL.$comment: Canonical BBL (Borough-Block-Lot) provided by nyc-commons. The Outdoor Public Art Inventory carries Block + Lot columns that resolve to a BBL for the City-owned parcel an artwork sits on.

AgencyReference.$comment: Canonical AgencyReference provided by nyc-commons. PDC submissions always originate from the City agency with jurisdiction over the property (lead agency), often with a secondary/managing agency.

ProjectType.description: PDC project type ('PROJECT_TYPE') — the design discipline of the reviewed project. Enum from the distinct values in the Monthly Design Review dataset (tfrc-rjtr).

LevelOfReview.description: Stage of PDC design review ('LEVEL_OF_REVIEW'). PDC reviews most projects in phases (Conceptual → Preliminary → Final), with 'Amended' resubmissions and combined stages. Enum from the distinct values in the Monthly Design Review dataset (tfrc-rjtr).

ReviewAction.description: How a submitted project is calendared for a meeting ('ACTION') — the consent-vs-full-review distinction. Consent items are batch-voted; public hearings get full Commission review. Enum from the distinct values in the Monthly Design Review dataset (tfrc-rjtr).

ReviewResult.description: Disposition of a project after PDC review ('RESULT'). Enum from the distinct values in the Annual Report dataset (5fsv-ze7v).

ConstructionType.description: Nature of the work under review ('CONSTRUCTION_TYPE'). Enum from the distinct values in the Annual Report dataset (5fsv-ze7v).

PublicPrivate.description: Whether the project is on/for public property, privately leased City property, or both ('PUBLIC_PRIVATE'). Normalized from the source datasets' mixed casing.

SubmissionCategory.description: The five broad submission categories PDC's application process is organized around, each with its own checklist of submission requirements.

PersonName.$comment: Canonical PersonName provided by nyc-commons. Used for commissioners, artists, and architects.

Creator.description: A person credited on a work in the City's collection — artist, architect, or landscape architect (from the Outdoor Public Art Inventory's *_first/_middle/_last columns).

organization.description: Firm / foundry / fabricator name where the credit is an organization.
